evidence: coverEntropy at CoverEntropy.lean:428; doc: 'implements Bowen-Dinaburg's definitions of the topological entropy'. Currently unmapped; sibling decls only carry Q166314 (chaos theory, too loose).
translationNumber at TranslationNumber.lean:547; module doc: 'called the translation number... rot'. Q643156 desc: 'invariant of homeomorphisms of the circle'.
structure Subshift at Basic.lean:229 = 'closed, shift-invariant subsets of the full shift' (doc line 53). Q7496253 desc: infinite words closed under product topology, invariant under shift operator.

structure Conservative at Conservative.lean:56, extends QuasiMeasurePreserving with recurrence; doc: 'f : α → α to be a conservative system w.r.t. μ'. Matches dynamics sense, not physics-friction sense.
structure MeasurePreserving at MeasurePreserving.lean:45 (map f μa = μb); Q1003225 is the endomorphism case (α=β,μa=μb) used throughout Dynamics/Ergodic; general two-space form is broader.

Theorem at Conservative.lean:195, doc: 'Poincaré recurrence... a.e. point x is recurrent: visits every nbhd infinitely often.' Currently mapped only to Q187536 butterfly effect (wrong); Q7303259 is precise.
class at Transitive.lean:40: for nonempty open U,V exists m with (m•U)∩V nonempty. Q123375197 sitelinks to enwiki 'Topological transitivity'. Currently only Q166314 chaos theory (too broad).

def omegaLimit at OmegaLimit.lean:47, filter-parametrized; specializes to classical omega-limit set at f=atTop (notation ω⁺). Q1825444: 'state a dynamical system reaches after infinite time, fwd or bwd'.
theorem at AddCircleAdd.lean:28: Ergodic (a+·) ↔ addOrderOf a = 0, i.e. rotation by a ergodic iff a/p irrational. Q6073537: 'Rotation of a circle by an angle of π times an irrational number'.
def fixedPoints at Defs.lean:28: {x | IsFixedPt f x}. Q217608: 'point left unchanged by a function' — exact match; not in universe yet (only named theorems like Q1422068 present).
theorem at Newton.lean:106, proves iterating P.newtonMap (x ↦ x-P(x)/P'(x)) converges to a nilpotent-close root — fixed-point-iteration convergence generalized via nilpotence not metric contraction.
